ABOUT THE SICILIAN BUTCHER
From seasonal menus to pasta made in-house daily, The Sicilian Butcher marries chef-driven innovation with authentic Sicilian cuisine. Join us for lunch, dinner, or our all-day happy hour. Visit our bakery for fresh pastries, authentic cannolis, gelato, and coffee, starting at 8 a.m. daily.
We validate 2 hours of parking in The Finery garage.
Features
Dine-In
Pickup
Catering
Delivery
Private Events
Gluten-Free Options
Craft Cocktails
In Italy, we come to the table not only to eat, but to share— stories, laughter, excitement, and the joy of being together. As pasta is passed and wine is poured, friends become family and memories become legend. This is the tradition Chef Tomaso gave to our family.
Now, we're extending the invitation to you.. come, sit, eat.
ITALIAN HOSPITALITY
Craft Meatballs and Charcuterie Bar, is a modern-casual restaurant for Sicilian and Italian-inspired charcuterie and bruschetta boards, fresh, handmade pasta made daily and a choose-your-own-meatball experience.
VIEW MENU
FAMILY RUN, CHEF DRIVEN
Craft Meatballs and Charcuterie Bar, is a modern-casual restaurant for Sicilian and Italian-inspired charcuterie and bruschetta boards, fresh, handmade pasta made daily and a choose-your-own-meatball experience.
VIEW MENU
CAREERS
Join our team of energetic people who are helping The Sicilian Butcher become the most successful eatery in America!
